pi_items.source: task.json specification for output file location
task.json and README specify 2 masks (bone and soft tissue)
task.json threshold requirement consistent with bone tissue classification
task.json threshold requirement consistent with bone tissue classification
task.json threshold requirement consistent with soft tissue classification
Confirmed by setup_task.sh and GitHub release download URL https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip
Downloaded DICOM data from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip and counted files
DICOM metadata inspection shows PixelSpacing = 0.4785156 mm
DICOM metadata inspection shows PixelSpacing = 0.4785156 mm
DICOM metadata inspection shows SliceThickness = 2.0 mm
InVesalius User Manual Table 6.1: Bone preset is 226–3021 HU
InVesalius User Manual Table 6.1 confirms bone preset is 226–3021 HU, not 3071
InVesalius User Manual Table 6.1: Soft Tissue preset is −700–225 HU
InVesalius User Manual Table 6.1: Soft Tissue preset is −700–225 HU
Standard medical reference: muscle tissue HU range is -5 to 135 HU
Standard medical reference: muscle tissue HU range is -5 to 135 HU

privileged_info_summary: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset contains 108 slices from the official InVesalius v3.0 release (https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip); The actual DICOM pixel spacing is 0.4785156 mm × 0.4785156 mm (not 0.957×0.957 mm as claimed in README); The actual slice thickness is 2.0 mm (not 1.5 mm as claimed in README); InVesalius bone preset threshold range is 226–3021 HU (not 3071 HU as claimed in README); InVesalius soft tissue preset threshold range is −700–225 HU (verified correct); Standard muscle tissue HU range is −5–135 HU (verified correct); Task.json metadata for bone and soft tissue threshold requirements (min_hu ≥150, max_hu ≥1000 for bone; max_hu ≤300 for soft tissue) are reasonable and verifiable
